title: Hiring Category Manager at Urban Ladder

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Urban Ladder
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
